[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'home workout equipment' signals discretionary recovery",
    "family": "attention_sentiment",

      "source": "Google Trends weekly search interest for 'home workout equipment'",

      "stable": true

    "behavior": "Rising interest in home fitness gear often precedes increased discretionary spending on related consumer products.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLY",
      "rationale": "Increased fitness interest drives discretionary retail sales growth."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Entry when 2-week moving average of search interest rises by more than 15% week-over-week",
      "exit": "Exit when search interest falls below 5% week-over-week or after 4 weeks",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Google Trends data for common consumer keywords regularly shows weekly spikes."
  },
